# Skill: synthesize

## Purpose
Aggregate all existing critiques into a `SYNTHESIS_WAVE_N.md` document that identifies convergences and unresolved tensions.

## Trigger
Human invokes this skill from `LOOP.md` Step 3 (Aggregate & Synthesize) after the critique wave is closed.

## Inputs
- All files matching `docs/charter_evolution/critiques/critique_*.md`
- `docs/governance/dissensus_ledger.md` — to cross-reference existing recorded tensions

## Steps
1. Run `python scripts/agentic_orchestrator.py balance` to confirm all critiques pass structure validation before proceeding.
2. Read every critique file and extract:
   - Convergent findings (same issue raised by multiple lenses)
   - Divergent or lens-specific findings
   - Proposed revisions that appear more than once
   - Dissent positions
3. Produce `docs/charter_evolution/SYNTHESIS_WAVE_<N>.md` using the structure:
   ```
   # Synthesis Wave <N>
   Critiques ingested: <count>
   ## Convergences
   ## Divergences
   ## Proposed revisions shortlist
   ## Unresolved tensions
   ```
4. Increment N relative to the last existing synthesis file.

## Outputs
- `docs/charter_evolution/SYNTHESIS_WAVE_<N>.md`

## No API calls
All content is generated by the human-controlled AI agent reading local files only. No external endpoints are contacted.
